Off Calendar Jun-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Murphy, Esq and John Girarde, Esq. of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney, 415-788-1900 for defendants and moving parties Gerald Murphy and Luce, Forward, Hamilton & Scripps, LLP
Herbert Yanowitz, Esq., 415-362-1365 for plaintiff and opposing party Desert Outdoor Advertising, Inc.

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT GERALD MURPHY, LUCE, FORWARD, HAMILTON & SCRIPPS, LLP A LIMITED'S Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration IS GRANTED. ARBITRATION IS COMPELLED AND THIS ACTION IS STAYED. OBJECTIONS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB)
